input.background: Eight diabetic patients had plasma glucose levels (mmol/l) measured before and one hour after oral administration of 100 g glucose, with the following results: Patient, Before, After, Change.
input.question: Calculate the standard error of the mean change in plasma glucose.

output.answer: The SE of the mean is SD / sqrt(n), which is 2.3629 / sqrt(8) = 0.8354.
